scripts.demo:dev: concurrently -k -n wallet,app -c green,blue "preview-wallet --env-file apps/next-demo/.env.local" "npm --workspace @preview-wallet/next-demo run dev"
scripts.demo:check: npm run wallet:check && npm --workspace @preview-wallet/next-demo run check
scripts.wallet:check: npm --workspace @preview-wallet/wallet run check && npm --workspace @preview-wallet/wallet run test
